markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GTM strategy for events and community growth.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New GTM Framework:** Adopted a tiered outreach strategy (Breakfasts/Dinners, Workshops, Always-On) to manage audience fatigue and maximize ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [**Workshop Audience Expansion:** Will test expanding the workshop audience to include junior roles (e.g., 50+ employee filter) to increase registration volume, while keeping senior-level events exclusive.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [**"Always-On" Campaign:** Will launch a trigger-based campaign for AI/SEO topics, messaging users who engage with relevant LinkedIn posts to offer workshop recordings.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [**Audience Fatigue Control:** A 2-month cooldown period will be implemented for all outreach, with the option to add a HubSpot activity check to prevent over-contact.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### The Audience Fatigue Problem

  - [**Challenge:** High-volume event outreach risks fatiguing the audience.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [**Solution:** Proactively share future event dates in positive replies to capture attention when engagement is highest.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)

### New GTM Framework

  - [**Priority 1: Breakfasts & Dinners**](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
      - [**Audience:** Exclusive (Director, VP+).](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
      - [**Channels:** LinkedIn, personal messages.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
      - [**Rationale:** High-value events for the sales funnel; require a strict, high-quality audience.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [**Priority 2: Workshops**](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [**Tier A (Broad):** Open to anyone in growth.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
          - [**Channels:** LinkedIn, email.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
      - [**Tier B (Co-Host Focused):** Targets the co-host's followers.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Leverages a pre-primed audience, which drove the success of the KC workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
          - [**Example:** Fletch workshop will target a list scraped from the co-host's 67k+ followers.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [**Priority 3: "Always-On" Community Promotion**](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
      - [**Tactic 1: Asset Repurposing**](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
          - [Promote the KC workshop recording to a non-overlapping audience.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
      - [**Tactic 2: Trigger-Based Outreach**](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
          - [**Concept:** Message users who engage with high-volume LinkedIn posts on AI/SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
          - [**Offer:** A relevant workshop recording (e.g., ChatGPT & SEO with Webflow's evangelist).](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Captures users with demonstrated, real-time interest in a topic.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)

### Audience Expansion & Metrics

  - [**Proposal:** Expand the workshop audience by removing the $5M+ funding filter and using a 50+ employee filter instead.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [**Decision:** Test this change for workshops only.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [**New Metric:** Track workshop registrants by title/seniority to measure the impact of the audience expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### Calendar & Logistics

  - [**Rob Workshop:** Date to be finalized in a Monday meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**February Breakfast:** Speaker is confirmed.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**Briefs:** Gloria will create briefs for the February breakfast and the Rob workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [**Cadence:** At least one breakfast and one workshop per month.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Understory:**](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [Test the expanded workshop audience and report on reply rates and registrant seniority.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [Design the trigger-based "always-on" AI/SEO campaign for review next week.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Finalize the Rob workshop date in the Monday meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
      - [Create briefs for the February breakfast and the Rob workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/vo2rNPQ8jpyiubAMG1TMTrya_S3CzxXV?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
